title: Chester Races - May Festival
description: Three days of world-class horse racing at the oldest racecourse in England. Great atmosphere, food stalls, and live music.

title: Chester Food & Drink Festival
description: Annual food festival with over 100 stalls, cooking demos from local chefs, and plenty of free samples.

title: Storyhouse: The Comedy Store
description: Live stand-up comedy night featuring four top comics. Doors open at 7pm, show starts at 8pm.

title: Chester Christmas Markets
description: Festive market with wooden chalets selling handmade gifts, hot food, mulled wine, and seasonal treats.

title: Chester Literature Festival
description: Week-long festival of talks, readings, and workshops with authors from across the UK.

title: Chester Pride
description: Chester's annual Pride celebration with a parade through the city centre, live music, and community stalls.

title: Moonlight Flicks - Outdoor Cinema
description: Watch classic films under the stars in the Roman Gardens. Bring a blanket and a picnic.

title: Chester Half Marathon
description: 13.1 miles through Chester's streets and along the River Dee. Open to runners of all abilities.

title: Handbridge Community Market
description: Monthly community market with local producers selling bread, cheese, veg, and handmade goods.

title: Chester Music Festival
description: Classical music performances in the stunning setting of Chester Cathedral. Free lunchtime concerts included.
